payload.answer: I can’t safely remember “the thing from yesterday” without more details. Please provide what happened, who was involved, or any distinguishing details.

entity_resolution.reason: The referenced item is too vague to identify reliably; committing it would create an ambiguous or incorrect durable memory.

payload.intent: Store a memory from a vague reference to “the thing from yesterday.”

details: No durable memory stored due to ambiguity.

repair_options: Describe the event or item in a sentence.
Name any people, places, or dates involved.
Provide a short phrase that uniquely identifies the memory.
